examples: Overhead of Agora ruins at Greek-Roman site, Apollonia.
The ruins of its acropolis, agora, theater, and temples remain.
No longer do people have to gather round the agora to do their business.
Agora is currently owned by RIT Capital Partners and Lord Rothschild's family interests, along with management.
It somehow reminds me ... of something in ancient Greece, the agora, the marketplace.
